message:
fix(test): add missing recovery field to HealthCheckResponse test constructors

The `recovery: Option<RecoveryStatusResponse>` field was added to
HealthCheckResponse as part of the durability program but the two
test constructors in identity.rs were not updated, causing
`error[E0063]: missing field `recovery`` in CI.

Also bumps version to 0.2.32.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
